title: Inscription-For The Relief By Preston Powers
content:
The Eagle, stooping from yon snow-blown peaks,
    For the wild hunter and the Bison seeks,
    In the changed world below; and finds alone
    Their graven semblance in the eternal stone
meaning:
John Greenleaf Whittier's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Inscription-For The Relief By Preston Powers"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
